question: What is the primary characteristic of Selection Sort?
options: It repeatedly selects the largest element
It repeatedly selects the smallest element
correctAnswer: It repeatedly selects the smallest element

options: Swaps adjacent elements if out of order
correctAnswer: Swaps adjacent elements if out of order

options: At the beginning of the list
At its correct position in the sorted part
At the end of the list
correctAnswer: At its correct position in the sorted part

correctAnswer: It works well with uniformly distributed data
